qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Bundled blog demo uses a public cookie secret, enabling signed-cookie auth bypass
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding is in demos/blog/blog.py and depends on the demo's public cookie_secret; the advisory fixes tornado/httputil.py multipart parsing limits for DoS, so the vulnerable code and root cause are different.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the vulnerable multipart/form-data parsing path in tornado/httputil.py or the missing part-count limit/root-cause condition fixed in Tornado 6.5.5.
evidence: The advisory patch for GHSA-qjxf-f2mg-c6mc adds ParseMultipartConfig limits in tornado/httputil.py, including a default max_parts limit and multipart header-size checks, to stop synchronous multipart parsing DoS.

blog_demo_cookie_forgery targets demos/blog/blog.py, where a repository-public cookie_secret allows signed-cookie forgery and unauthorized blog post creation; it does not involve multipart parsing or parser-driven resource exhaustion.
